page_content:
Formerly: CMSC838J.

CMSC732 Human Factors in Security and Privacy (3 Credits) Introducing a variety of important topics at the intersection of human factors and privacy and security, and developing skills in designing human-subjects studies to evaluate problems and solutions related to these topics.

Recommended: Previous coursework in human-computer interaction, security and privacy.

Credit Only Granted for. CMSC818D or CMSC732.
